entities.name: Design Specification
entities.context: Phase 3 of a development process focused on documenting system design before implementation

entities.name: System Architecture
entities.context: Documentation of components, relationships, data flow, and integration points

entities.name: Data Flow
entities.context: How data moves through the system, part of architecture documentation

entities.name: Integration Points
entities.context: Where system connects with external services or components

entities.name: File Structure
entities.context: Organization of files including locations and naming conventions

entities.name: Error Handling
entities.context: Strategy for what can go wrong, recovery approaches, and logging

entities.name: Testing Strategy
entities.context: Validation approach including dry-run and production validation

entities.name: Dry-run Approach
entities.context: Testing technique to validate before production execution

entities.name: Design Spec Document
entities.context: Deliverable artifact from Phase 3 containing full design specification

relationships.context: System architecture is first component documented in design spec
File structure is second component documented in design spec
Error handling is third component documented in design spec
Testing strategy is fourth component documented in design spec
Data flow is a sub-element of system architecture
Integration points are sub-element of system architecture
Dry-run is a key technique within testing strategy
Design spec document is the deliverable output of this phase
